description_long: This bird features a slender, streamlined body with olive-brown plumage covering most of its back and wings, and a long, straight tail that is slightly frayed at the tip. Its head is capped with a rich chestnut-brown color, contrasting with a black face mask and a distinct white patch on the cheek. The beak is short, conical, and black, suited for seed-eating. The underparts are lighter, blending from pale brown to off-white near the throat and belly. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail feathers are elongated and slightly pointed. The legs are not clearly visible but are likely dark in color, typical of many urban passerines.
description: A slender, olive-brown bird with a chestnut crown, black face mask, white cheek patch, and a long, straight tail. Its beak is short and conical, and the plumage is smooth with subtle color gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's olive-brown back, chestnut head, black face mask, white cheek patch, and long tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, elongated tail and the symmetry of the tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the beak, face mask, and tail length.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the chestnut crown, black face mask, white cheek patch, and the conical beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-brown back, chestnut crown, black face mask, white cheek patch, and subtle gradients on underparts
